title: bellis sylvestris subsp. pappulosa
intro: Bellis sylvestris subsp. pappulosa, also known as the daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Bellis sylvestris subsp. pappulosa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
